title: Restored Female Gender Mod
description: An edit of WildfireRomeo's Female Gender mod to restore original size and physics.
body:
A hackjob edit of [Wildfire's Female Gender mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) to restore original size and physics. Press G to configure.

As a disclaimer, I'm not a programmer, I don't know what I'm doing, so if I've inadverdantly made something crash, I can't help. Sorry!

- **Works in 1.20.4, however the Appearance menu crashes the game. In `/config/WildfireGender`, edit the json file or copy one over from a previous version.**
